publishedAbstract: - $ oc logs-n openshift-storage ocs-operator-* shows unhelpful warning message.- Can we ignore this message? ~~~ $ oc logs-n openshift-storage ocs-operator-1a1badbeef-9aa9a | grep "might not" W0917 10:51:30.590093 1 client_config.go:618] Neither--kubeconfig nor--master was specified. Using the inClusterConfig. This might not work. W0917 10:51:31.762810 1 client_config.go:618] Neither--kubeconfig nor--master was specified. Using the inClusterConfig. This might not work. W0917 10:51:56.534384 1 client_config.go:618] Neither--kubeconfig nor--master was specified. Using the inClusterConfig. This might not work. W0917 10:52:57.148934 1 client_config.go:618] Neither--kubeconfig nor--master was specified. Using the inClusterConfig. This might not work. W0917 10:53:57.748827 1 client_config.go:618] Neither--kubeconfig nor--master was specified. Using the inClusterConfig. This might not work. W0917 10:54:58.359742 1 client_config.go:618] Neither--kubeconfig nor--master was specified. Using the inClusterConfig. This might not work. ~~~
publishedTitle: Unhelpful log warning message "Neither --kubeconfig nor --master was specified.  Using the inClusterConfig.  This might not work." in ocs-operator log.
